[Q] 몇 개예요? (myeot gae-ye-yo?) / [A] 하나예요: [Q] 몇 잔이에요? (myeot jan-i-e-yo?) / [A] 두 잔이에요 (du jan-i-e-yo)

[Q] I will take the photo. Ready? / [A] One, two, three.

[Q] Which number is it? / [A] It is number four.
